title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: LINCOLN CITY COMMUNITY SHELTER AND RESOURCE CENTER DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of socks, gloves, jackets, blankets, waterproof shoes, and toilet paper. 2125 NW Highway 101 Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: No standard hours (541) 270-1005 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 270-1005 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for drop off information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lincoln County Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - OVERNIGHT WINTER WARMING SHELTER VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
